title: ITC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: ITC Limited is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
